originalTitle: GameStop investors clear the way for a fresh attempt at buying eBay
summary: Shareholders approved a change that will let the video-game retailer issue more stock.
content: Shareholders approved a change that will let the video-game retailer issue more stock.
chineseTitle: GameStop 投资者为收购 eBay 的新尝试扫清了道路
chineseSummary: 股东批准了一项变更，允许视频游戏零售商发行更多股票。
chineseContent: 股东批准了一项变更，允许视频游戏零售商发行更多股票。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
